posts.author: YvesL (Yves Lecluyse)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Setting up my first integrations,
Is it possible to add Workspace - Group to an event in outlook made in monday.

So i have a couple of workspaces, each workspace has a couple of groups, then some items and sometimes sub items.

When i integrate with outlook, the block in my outlook only shows the item.
and i need the workspace and groupname as well.

how can i do this?
